title: The Buster Call Begins
description: Robin escapes Ohara with the burden of its history and the fear that anyone close to her will be destroyed.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this part follows Spandam, Nico Robin, Nico Olvia, Professor Clover, Jaguar D. Saul. Robin escapes Ohara with the burden of its history and the fear that anyone close to her will be destroyed.

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: My, my, my... If an ex-Marine

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: Gets in the way of buster call,

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Aokiji....!! Can you be proud of

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: The thing called "Justice" changes its shape

dialogue.speaker: Nico Olvia
dialogue.text: So, I won't blame you for "justice."

dialogue.speaker: Professor Clover
dialogue.text: But if you get in our way,

dialogue.speaker: Spandine
dialogue.text: WHA... WHA....!? Why did that happen!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: All sacrifices would've been a complete waste...!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: evil needs to be rooted out!!!

summary: Robin escapes Ohara with the burden of its history and the fear that anyone close to her will be destroyed.
